name: Default Full-Stack Template
description: A comprehensive full-stack web application template with Go backend, React frontend, and Docker orchestration
author: Mark Rodgers

variables.name: Name
variables.description: Alphanumeric name for your project (no spaces or underscores)

validation.message: Project name must be alphanumeric with hyphens only, no spaces or underscores

variables.name: RepoURL
variables.description: Git repository URL without protocol prefix

validation.message: Repository URL must be in format: domain.com/user/repo
Author must be in format: Name <email@example.com>

variables.name: Database
variables.description: Choose the database solution for your application

options.label: Flat File
options.description: Simple file-based storage, good for prototyping

options.label: PostgreSQL
options.description: Full-featured PostgreSQL database with Docker container

options.label: Microsoft SQL Server
options.description: Microsoft SQL Server with Docker container
